content.content: Write the following message to the channel starting with External: Hi, i am a bot

```python
channels = get_channels()
matching_channels = [c for c in channels if c.startswith("External")]

if len(matching_channels) == 0:
    raise ValueError("No channel starting with 'External' was found.")

target_channel = matching_channels[0]
send_channel_message(channel=target_channel, body="Hi, i am a bot")
print(f"Message sent to channel: {target_channel}")
```
